channel.title: CO on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in CO on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Teller County Sheriff’s Office (CO)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Teller County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: June 8, 2020 County: Teller County State: CO FIPS: 08119

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Adams County Jail — Adams, CO
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Adams County Jail in Adams County, CO.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Arapahoe County Jail — Arapahoe, CO
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Arapahoe County Jail in Arapahoe County, CO.

item.title: ARDENT GROUP, LLC — ICE SUMMIT, CO $9,296,000
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ARDENT GROUP, LLC Award ID: 70CDCR26C00000003 Amount: $9,296,000.00 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE ICE HEALTH SERVICE CORPS WITH A PHARMACY BENEFIT MANAGER TO MANAGE FORMULARY, CLAIMS PROCESSING, PHARMACY NETWORK ADMINISTRATION, AND BENEFIT PLAN DESIGN. Period: 2025-10-25 to 2026-04-24 Location: SUMMIT, CO (FIPS: 08117)

item.title: Aurora City Jail — Arapahoe, CO
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Aurora City Jail in Arapahoe County, CO.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: B.I. INCORPORATED — ICE BOULDER, CO $108,343,853
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: B.I. INCORPORATED Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000127 Amount: $108,343,853.00 Description: THIS TASK ORDER FACILITATES THE INTENSIVE SUPERVISION APPEARANCE PROGRAM (ISAP) V. ISAP PROVIDES ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS (ERO) WITH A COST-EFFECTIVE ALTERNATIVE TO DETENTION, UTILIZING TECHNOLOGY AND CASE MANAGEMENT. Period: 2025-09-30 to 2026-09-29 Location: BOULDER, CO (FIPS: 08013)

item.title: B.I. INCORPORATED — ICE BOULDER, CO $151,182,337
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: B.I. INCORPORATED Award ID: 70CDCR20FR0000023 Amount: $151,182,337.45 Description: INTENSIVE SUPERVISION APPEARANCE PROGRAM (ISAP IV) Period: 2020-03-23 to 2021-07-31 Location: BOULDER, CO (FIPS: 08013)

item.description:
ICE contract.

item.title: THE GEO GROUP, INC. — ICE ADAMS, CO $22,904,058
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THE GEO GROUP, INC. Award ID: HSCEDM14J00031 Amount: $22,904,058.24 Description: IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION. DETENTION MANAGMENT, MEDICAL SERVICES, TRANSPORTATION SERVICES, FOOD SERVICES FOR DHS/ICE AUROROA, CO AT GEO GROUP COCA FACILITY. Period: 2014-09-16 to 2015-09-15 Location: ADAMS, CO (FIPS: 08001)

item.description:

item.title: THE GEO GROUP, INC. — ICE ARAPAHOE, CO $66,893,395
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THE GEO GROUP, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000111 Amount: $66,893,395.00 Description: THIS TASK ORDER PROVIDES DETENTION, TRANSPORTATION, AND MEDICAL SERVICES AT THE AURORA, CO CONTRACT DETENTION FACILITY. Period: 2025-10-16 to 2026-08-15 Location: ARAPAHOE, CO (FIPS: 08005)
